sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86821" key="probi/wtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προβῐ´-ωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n86821.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having had a prior existence,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὐ π. [ἡψυχὴ] τοῦ σώματος ἔσται</foreign> Sophon. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in de An.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">135.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
